Poker Hand #RC9000000002: Hold'em No Limit ($0.05/$0.1) - 2023/12/04 08:00:00
Table 'RushAndCash99999999' 6-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: Hero ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 2: Villain ($10.00 in chips)
Hero: posts small blind $0.05
Villain: posts big blind $0.1
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [Ah Kc]
Dealt to Villain
Villain: raises $0.30 to $0.40
Hero: raises $1.00 to $1.40
Villain: calls $1.00
*** FLOP *** [2c 5h 9d]
Hero: bet $1.50
Villain: call $1.50
*** TURN *** [2c 5h 9d] [Ac]
Hero: raises $7.10 to $7.10 and is all-in
Villain: calls $7.10 and is all-in
Hero: shows [Ah Kc]
Villain: shows [Qh Qd]
*** RIVER *** [2c 5h 9d Ac] [3s]
*** SHOWDOWN ***
Hero collected $19.53 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $19.80 | Rake $0.27 | Jackpot $0 | Bingo $0 | Fortune $0 | Tax $0
Board [2c 5h 9d Ac 3s]
Seat 1: Hero (small blind) showed [Ah Kc] and won ($19.53) with a pair of Aces
Seat 2: Villain (big blind) showed [Qh Qd] and lost with a pair of Queens
